svg.title: research-git capture and removal workflow in Codex
svg.desc: Codex fixes and automatically captures a real KTransformers FlashInfer MLA precision invariant, then uses the saved capsule to safely remove that optimization while preserving the Torch fallback.

g.text: › Fix FlashInfer MLA precision and validate it against the Torch reference.
└ Compared FlashInfer with the Torch reference

text.tspan: — Preserve model scale and Torch parity.
Validate with HumanEval (89.6) before enabling FlashInfer MLA. Keep this capsule?

g.text: • 840 commits later • 345,104 lines changed since this capsule was saved.
› Add long-context chunked prefill and decode replanning.
└ Traced prefill, decode, and KV-cache paths
└ Found chunk boundaries in cache planning
└ Updated chunk planning without changing decode semantics
› Keep complete Transformer layers available for CPU offload.

text.tspan: Explored transfer maps and device dispatch

g.text: └ Found GPU-only assumptions in attention routing
› Integrate Triton and vendor-specific attention backends.

text.tspan: Explored backend routing and kernel guards

g.text: └ Compared Torch, Triton, and vendor paths

text.tspan: Edited backend dispatch and precision guards

g.text: › Add SGLang serving and support new model families.

text.tspan: Explored server, adapters, and model registry

g.text: › Add AMX and AVX kernel variants for MoE inference.

text.tspan: Explored CPU kernels and quantized layouts
Ran kernel benchmarks and correctness tests

g.text: › Support Qwen, DeepSeek, and multimodal model families.

text.tspan: Explored model loaders and architecture adapters

g.text: └ Added configs, mappings, and runtime guards
› Add distributed serving and scheduler improvements.

text.tspan: Explored workers, queues, and request routing

g.text: › Harden quantized weight loading and release tooling.

text.tspan: Explored loaders, packaging, and CI workflows

g.text: └ Inspected RAWINT4, Marlin, and loader mappings
└ Traced wheel, submodule, and release workflows
└ Fixed quantized formats and release paths
└ Built CPU and CUDA package variants

text.tspan: Remove the FlashInfer MLA optimization but keep generation behavior unchanged.

g.text: └ Resolved depends_on graph → no additional capsules
└ Loaded intent, knobs, assumptions, and guide
└ Located the legacy Torch attention path
└ Removed FlashInfer MLA dispatch and imports
└ Kept model scaling and the Torch attention path
Removed the FlashInfer MLA optimization without reverting unrelated attention work.
The Torch fallback remains active; the capsule is preserved for future use.

text.tspan: Remove the FlashInfer MLA optimization but keep generation behavior unchanged.
